When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
tokens.flavor_text: In the year 2271, the Desert Rangers of Nevada and rangers of the New California Republic met at this spot to sign the Ranger Unification Treaty.

tokens.name: Bitterblossom
tokens.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 black Faerie Rogue creature token with flying.
tokens.flavor_text: In Lorwyn's brief evenings, the sun pauses at the horizon long enough for a certain species of violet to bloom with the fragrance of mischief.

tokens.name: Caesar, Legion's Emperor
tokens.oracle_text:
Whenever you attack, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, choose two —
• Create two 1/1 red and white Soldier creature tokens with haste that are tapped and attacking.
• You draw a card and you lose 1 life.
• Caesar deals damage equal to the number of creature tokens you control to target opponent.

tokens.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
tokens.name: Charismatic Conqueror
tokens.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever an artifact or creature an opponent controls enters untapped, they may tap that permanent. If they don't, you create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.
tokens.flavor_text: "There's a whole world under the surface, waiting for the light of our salvation."

tokens.name: City's Blessing
tokens.flavor_text: Once you have ascended to the highest temple of Orazca, the power of the Immortal Sun is yours to wield forever.

tokens.name: Command Tower
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

tokens.name: Copy
tokens.oracle_text: (This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.)

tokens.name: Deadly Dispute
tokens.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
tokens.flavor_text:
"You go break up that bar brawl yet? People are gonna get hurt unless you step in."
—Sheriff Marion

tokens.name: Elspeth, Storm Slayer
tokens.oracle_text:
If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead.
+1: Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
0: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying until your next turn.
−3: Destroy target creature an opponent controls with mana value 3 or greater.

tokens.name: Faerie Rogue
tokens.oracle_text: Flying

tokens.name: General's Enforcer
tokens.oracle_text:
Legendary Humans you control have indestructible.
{2}{W}{B}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.
tokens.flavor_text:
"A veteran ranger inspires awe. Stick around for when they get here, you'll see."
—NCR trooper

Kambal, Profiteering Mayor
tokens.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more tokens your opponents control enter, for each of them, create a tapped token that's a copy of it. This ability triggers only once each turn.
Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

tokens.name: Martial Coup
tokens.oracle_text: Create X 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. If X is 5 or more, destroy all other creatures.
tokens.flavor_text: Elder Nolan McNamara broke the Chain That Binds, starting the events which led to Hardin's coup.

tokens.name: Ocelot Pride
tokens.oracle_text:
First strike, lifelink
Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.)
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, create a 1/1 white Cat creature token. Then if you have the city's blessing, for each token you control that entered this turn, create a token that's a copy of it.

tokens.name: Pitiless Plunderer
tokens.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
tokens.flavor_text: "You won't need this. I made sure of that."

tokens.type_line: Legendary Creature — Human Avatar Soldier // Legendary Creature — Angel Nightmare Avatar

card_faces.name: Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER
card_faces.oracle_text:
Whenever Sephiroth enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever another creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If this is the fourth time this ability has resolved this turn, transform Sephiroth.

card_faces.name: Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel
card_faces.oracle_text:
Flying
Super Nova — As this creature transforms into Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel, you get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life."
Whenever Sephiroth attacks, you may sacrifice any number of other creatures. If you do, draw that many cards.

tokens.oracle_text: Whenever a creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

tokens.name: Warrior
tokens.flavor_text: The ancient warriors of Wakanda fought for a legacy that would last forever.

tokens.name: Windcrag Siege
tokens.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose Mardu or Jeskai.
• Mardu — If a creature attacking causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
• Jeskai — At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. It gains lifelink and haste until end of turn.
